steps.title: Intake and inventory
steps.why: This is the generic device runbook - DUPLICATE it for each device class you run (access point, switch, printer, camera) and tailor the steps.
steps.instructions: Record it in AssetMost (Assets > Onboard); issue the asset tag and label the unit.
steps.record: Device in inventory with tag, serial, model, location.

subtasks.title: Static IP or DHCP reservation + DNS record
subtasks.done_when: The device answers at a name, not a mystery IP.

steps.title: Admin credential into the registry
steps.why: Default passwords on infrastructure are how guests become admins.
steps.instructions: Change the default admin password; store it in the registry as a SERVICE account linked to this device.
steps.done_when: The default password no longer works; the registry credential does.

steps.title: Firmware current
steps.done_when: Running the latest stable firmware; auto-update on if supported.

steps.title: Hardening
steps.instructions: Disable unused services (telnet, UPnP, WPS...); management UI restricted to the admin VLAN if possible.

steps.title: Record and monitor
steps.instructions: Location and what it serves on the device record; add to monitoring if it speaks SNMP/ping.
steps.done_when: Someone new could find and understand this device from AssetMost alone.
